description: I find it a really valuable tool for tracking time spent on projects. It is also easy for supervisors to see what team members are working on and how much time they take to complete tasks.
author: Glenda N.
pros: I like that we have the ability to specify projects and specific tasks.
cons: Because of my role at the organization, I constantly have to keep switching between multiple projects and tasks.

description: Really like that it is easy to use and it has multiple access to accounts. But not a fan of chat feed back.
author: Rhonda J.
pros: customer support is fantastic with answering all your question, the app is very easy to use. We are able to have 2 or more users with access.
cons: Communication through chats are not a favorite of mine. it is easier for me to resolve problem speaking to someone direct. Pricing is quite high

review_title: QuickBooks Time misses the mark for accounting firms
description: The program meets only the basic requirements for timekeeping. While it tracks time, dividing a single time block among multiple clients for billing purposes requires manual input. There's clear potential but Intuit appears to have missed the mark with this product... at least to their accounting firm market.
author: Scott N.
pros: Able to track employee hours just fine and tracks billing hours for clients that are already setup with Intuit products (QBO, Lacerte, PTO, etc.) and any client you've already built a profile within QBO for billing.
cons: As an accounting firm, our primary use of this product is to track billable hours. However, it is designed primarily for employee time tracking rather than professional billing. It functions well for small businesses managing employee timecards, but lacks the robust features needed by accounting or law firms that bill clients based on time.

description: Easy to use. Great for a small company. This product allowed us to customize what we needed to support our business and not have to fall to a "cookie cutter" system that doesn't truly support our organization.
author: Becca J.
pros: It was easy for me to personalize the pay codes for our organization and be able to customize it to our needs.
cons: There wasn't many but there were some items but they really don't stick out too much on the negative.

review_title: Simple, Reliable, and Easy Time Tracking Solution
description: Overall, my experience with QuickBooks Time has been positive. It made tracking employee hours and managing time cards much more organized and efficient. The ability to clock in and out through the mobile app was especially helpful and convenient, and it reduced the need for manual time entry. Overall, it’s a reliable tool that simplifies scheduling and time tracking for teams.
author: Yasmin M.
pros: QuickBooks Time was easy to use and helped simplify employee time tracking. I liked that it made it simple to clock in and out, and it automatically tracked hours accurately without needing much manual input. The mobile app was convenient, especially for people working in different locations, and it made it easy to monitor schedules and time entries in real time. Overall, it helped reduce errors and saved time on payroll and tracking tasks.
cons: Occasionally, the app can be slow or glitchy when syncing time entries, which can be frustrating if you’re trying to update things quickly. Overall, it works well, but the learning curve and occasional technical issues were the main downsides.

description: My overall experience has been positive. I like that it allows for easy tracking of accurate time, and I know that it makes running payroll much easier for my employer as it just moves our hours over into his payroll software with Quickbooks. I also like that I can see and keep up with my available sick day and vacation day hours.
author: MacKenzie C.
pros: Very straightforward software, makes it easy to track time and edit with supervisior permission. It is also nice that I am able to put in notes when I forget to clock back in after lunch...
cons: I wish that it would allow for my account to stay logged in online because sometimes it takes a few minutes to get logged in and that causes a few minutes to be deducted from my hours.

review_title: Accurate Time Tracking with Strong Payroll Integration
description: The platform makes it easy for employees to clock in and out from anywhere using the mobile app while administrators can monitor hours, manage schedules and approve timesheets!
author: Haley D.
pros: Time has made tracking employee hours simple and accurate especially with it's mobile app and GPS tracking features.
cons: The cost can be higher compared to other time-tracking solutions, particularly for small teams as i have been apart of in the past. Currently of no issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It’s a very handy software for all the accountants to track, post and pay the invoices associated with a specific project.
author: Mohammed M.
pros: It’s very user friendly and helps in tracking the invoices and payments perfectly without any hassles. The best part is we can use it from anywhere as this is a cloud based tool.
cons: As it is a cloud based, sometimes the system lags causing delays due to the downtime and updates of the software.

description: Overall, it is a great program that makes the accounting run very smooth for our small painting business. Makes weekly payroll a breeze with its easy user access. We have been using this program for about 3 to 4 years now and highly recommend it!
author: Natalie Y.
pros: The very easy integration with QuickBooks accounting software, the user-friendly app for not only tracking time but also the tracking the location of employees and the project they are currently working at.
cons: The cost is a little high and continually rising. The representatives for customer support can be hard to understand at times.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It makes it way easier to track your time, which allows you to make sure that everything is correct.
cons: Therea nothing really to dislike. Sometimes it glitches and that is the only bad thing in my opinion.

description: We have chosen QuickBooks time over another software we use to track out jobs because of the functionality and efficiency. We love how easy it is to review timecard and process payroll in one place.
author: Becca N.
pros: For the most part this app is user friendly and our team has been able to pick up on it quickly. We like that there is map tracking and the autorecognition when they are close to a jobsite.
cons: I wish there were more management settings for allowing employees to have certain functions. Sometimes when changing settings we feel as though they don't always update/change for the user.

review_title: Nostalgic, but not that good for 2025
description: The platform does the job, however, it needs a thorough review and upgrade to catch up with competitors as it feels very Y2k
author: Anna Z.
pros: It is simple, somewhat intuitive, works for both desktops and phones. Easy to run reports on employee time worked for any time period
cons: Old-fashioned interface, connection with other Intuit products, reports come up in only two formats and are hard to read

description: Really does what it says on the tin. Reasonable priced. Would be simple for most people to set up and train colleagues. But most importantly. It is accurate.
author: Tony H.
pros: That it is smooth, accurate and nice set up easy to maintain. Costs are rising and accuracy is a must.
cons: It did take rather a long time to set up. But help is always available and free. It may have taken me longer than most due to not being the sharpest IT person in the book.

description: Quite disappointing. The features seem great if you only have W-2 employees but if you have any 1099 then you are not supported.
author: Matthew S.
pros: It seems to work great for W-2 Employees.
cons: None of the features are applicable to 1099 contractors. The construction market has tons of contractors and they don't support us at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quickbooks time gets the job done.
description: Overall, QuickBooks Time is a reliable and user-friendly solution for time tracking and employee management. It’s a great fit for companies with remote and or field teams, with its flexibility and a streamlined approach to payroll. While there are occasional syncing hiccups, its integration with QuickBooks and mobile functionality make it a valuable tool for simplifying time tracking and improving overall efficiency.
author: Jamie G.
pros: What I like most about QuickBooks Time is its ease of use & flexibility in tracking employee hours. The mobile app is a great feature, allowing workers to clock in and out remotely, which is especially helpful for those in the field. The GPS tracking feature equals accuracy, and integration with payroll makes processing timesheets simple and efficient.
cons: The occasional syncing issues, especially when several users are trying to update their times simultaneously. Also, some of the advanced features, like reporting, can feel a bit limited or require additional customization to fit specific needs and that can be time consuming.

description: Overall, QuickBooks Time has been a solid upgrade for us. It cuts down on admin work, keeps timesheets accurate, and makes payroll way less stressful. It’s not perfect, but the time saved each week makes it worth it.
author: Kelly M.
pros: The payroll integration and mobile app. It saves hours of manual work and makes tracking super simple for everyone.
cons: Initial setup felt a little overwhelming, and some advanced scheduling tools are limited compared to standalone scheduling apps.

description: My overall experience with QuickBooks Time is a fantastic one. It exceeded my expectations and makes my daily work task much easier.
author: Meghan A.
pros: What I like the most about QuickBooks Time is the fact that I can keep track of hour with ease of mind that it is done correctly.
cons: The thing I liked the least about QuickBooks Time is all the authentication methods to log in but it is understandable because then I know my information is safe.

author: Nathan C.
pros: Simple and intuitive layout, very easy to follow without much hastle. Things load quickly meaning you don't miss much time.
cons: Sometimes it was a annoying needing to punch in and out for each break, but thats no fault of QuickBooks but rather my employer policies.

description: Support was helpful intergraded right into our system easy to use and navigate helpful incite right from dashboard.
author: Clinton C F.
pros: The results it's a great feature and helpful I would say must needed. Insights on your bottom line and where it's going
cons: Not to much bad I can say then getting started the set up but that I feel was more my issue then there's.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get Paid QUICK with QuickBooks Time
description: I use the mobile app more than the website, and even though I've experienced an issue of it crashing or freezing every so often, it's been so easy completing payroll.
author: Lisa W.
pros: The user interface is sleek, simple, and overall nice looking. Each section of the site is easy to maneuver.
cons: There isn't much room for customization of the site, and the cost of the subscription is a lot and may not be worth it to small business owners.

author: Patric G.
pros: It is an easy way to clock billable hours in a organized way as well as keep track of employees PTO, holidays, and sick days.
cons: I don't like how if you accidentally lock/submit your week, it is difficult to unlock without contacting your admin. I wish you were able to unlock it yourself if you make a mistake.

description: QuickBooks Time, it helps track working hours accurately and improves visibility on labor costs.
author: Jack S.
pros: Time tracking is simple for employees, and approvals are easy to manage. The integration with payroll tools saves time during processing.
cons: Mobile performance can vary depending on connectivity. Reporting options could be more detailed for advanced analysis.

description: The only thing I would say about this is that it’s a must for anyone that is running their own business. A well coded simple tool that comes in at great value
author: Ross M.
pros: This app has changed the game in terms of running a business. The simple interface, cheap price point and being able to do scheduling and payroll is a real game changer.
cons: The one con I feel with the software was the customer support. I felt when I needed help that it lacked and my simple query took a while to resolve.

author: joyelle S.
pros: sends an email to remind you when the email of the week is so you can make sure all your time is accurately recorded
cons: does not always notify if i forget to punch out or so sometimes time can be wrong and it messes up the next days time as well

description: Was a great experience when I attended college
author: Yvonne G.
pros: The excellence of the materials that are provided
cons: I have never had any problems out of QuickBooks
